title: WA Robot Response Envelope
description: Standard JSON envelope for all wa robot mode responses. Every robot command returns this structure with command-specific data in the 'data' field.

ok.description: Whether the command succeeded. When true, 'data' contains the result. When false, 'error' and 'error_code' describe the failure.

data.description: Command-specific response data. Present when ok=true. Type depends on the specific command.

error.description: Human-readable error message. Present when ok=false.

error_code.description: Machine-readable error code for programmatic handling. Present when ok=false. Format: 'robot.<code>' (e.g., 'robot.require_approval', 'robot.wezterm_not_running').

hint.description: Actionable suggestion for resolving the error. Present when ok=false and a remediation is known.

elapsed_ms.description: Time taken to execute the command in milliseconds.

now.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the response was generated.

error_codes.title: Standard Robot Error Codes
error_codes.description: Well-known error codes returned by robot commands
